heroSubtitle.en: A spatial design system that adapts. Type natural language or press Cmd+K to reshape the layout.
heroSubtitle.cn: 一个自适应的空间设计系统。输入自然语言或按 Cmd+K 切换布局。

aiPrompt.en: Try: make it more Apple / luxury / commercial / editorial...
aiPrompt.cn: 试试：极简 / 奢华 / 商业 / 编辑风格...

openingStatement.en: We design architecture not as pages, but as spatial sequences.
openingStatement.cn: 我们设计建筑般的空间序列，而非单一页面。

philosophyStatement.en: Each project is not an item. It is a spatial experience.
philosophyStatement.cn: 每一个项目都不是一个条目，而是一段空间体验。

aboutText.en: We are a design studio focused on industrial design and visual systems. Through structured methodology, we build clear and sustainable design frameworks for every project.
aboutText.cn: 我们是一间专注于工业设计与视觉系统的设计工作室。以结构化的方法论，为每个项目构建清晰、可持续的设计体系。

aboutStatement.en: Every object is a node in a larger system. We design the connections that make them meaningful.
aboutStatement.cn: 每一件物品都是更大系统中的节点。我们设计的是赋予它们意义的连接。

editorial.description: Single-column centered, serif display, gallery aesthetic

luxury.description: Ultra-generous spacing, warm palette, serif display, refined details

structured.description: Rigid grid, technical typography, data-driven, corporate aesthetic

desc.en: Minimal system design redefining the unity of form and function through modular thinking.
desc.cn: 以模块化思维重新定义产品形态与功能统一关系的极简系统设计。

detail.en: This project centers on systematic methodology, building a sustainable and iterative design framework through deep research in materials, craftsmanship, and user behavior. Each product is a node within the system, independent yet interconnected.
detail.cn: 该项目以系统化方法论为核心，通过对材料、工艺与用户行为的深入研究，构建一套可持续迭代的设计框架。每一件产品都是系统中的节点，既独立又互联。

concept.en: The project is arranged as a quiet architectural sequence. Objects, surfaces, and circulation are treated as one continuous field, allowing the visitor to read the system through proportion, pause, and material restraint.
concept.cn: 项目被组织成一段安静的建筑序列。物件、表面与动线被视为一个连续场域，让使用者通过比例、停顿与材料克制来阅读系统。

gallery.alt: Long interior view of Industrial Design System A

technicalNotes.label: Material
technicalNotes.value: Brushed aluminum, honed stone, translucent acrylic, and warm white indirect light.

technicalNotes.label: Concept
technicalNotes.value: A modular spatial order where product, display, and circulation share the same proportional grid.

technicalNotes.label: Detail
technicalNotes.value: All visible joints are reduced to thin shadow gaps so the system reads as a continuous architectural plane.

desc.en: Reshaping brand identity through architectural visual language, establishing a complete visual order from logotype to layout.
desc.cn: 以建筑感视觉语言重塑品牌识别系统，建立从标识到版式的完整视觉秩序。

detail.en: The brand system extends from the core logotype to color, typography, layout, and application guidelines. Every element is precisely calculated to ensure consistent visual experience across all media.
detail.cn: 品牌体系的构建从核心标识出发，延伸至色彩、字体、版式与应用规范。每一个元素都经过精确计算，确保在不同媒介上保持一致的视觉体验。

concept.en: This identity is treated as an exhibition route rather than a graphic package. Each surface becomes a page, each page becomes a room, and the brand is revealed through measured contrast and repeated spatial rhythm.
concept.cn: 该识别体系被视为一条展览路径，而非单纯的图形包装。每个表面是一页，每一页又像一个房间，品牌通过克制的对比与重复的空间节奏逐步显现。

technicalNotes.label: Typography
technicalNotes.value: A restrained grotesk type system is paired with generous margins and strict baseline intervals.

technicalNotes.label: Material
technicalNotes.value: Uncoated paper, matte vinyl, brushed steel signage, and low-contrast neutral backgrounds.

technicalNotes.label: Concept
technicalNotes.value: The identity behaves like an architectural grid, giving every format a calm and repeatable order.
